es.PrivacyThirdPartyDescription: PrTask se integra con servicios de terceros, incluidos GitHub para la autenticacion y la integracion de repositorios, procesadores de pago como Maya Business para el manejo de transacciones, Cloudflare para el alojamiento y la red de distribucion de contenido (CDN), y proveedores de verificacion de identidad para el cumplimiento de Know Your Customer (KYC). Cada servicio de terceros opera conforme a su propia politica de privacidad. Solo compartimos los datos minimos necesarios para que cada integracion funcione. Mantenemos Data Processing Agreements (DPAs) con todos los procesadores terceros, segun lo exigen el General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) y las leyes aplicables de proteccion de datos.
es.PrivacyUkGdprDescription: Si se encuentra en el Reino Unido, sus datos personales estan protegidos por el UK GDPR y la Data Protection Act 2018, aplicados por la Information Commissioner's Office (ICO). Usted dispone de los mismos derechos que los interesados de la Union Europea mencionados anteriormente, adaptados al derecho del Reino Unido. PrTask mantiene una base legal para tratar los datos de los residentes del Reino Unido e implementa medidas tecnicas y organizativas de seguridad apropiadas. Si PrTask no tiene un establecimiento en el Reino Unido, designaremos un representante en el Reino Unido cuando sea obligatorio. Para ejercer sus derechos o presentar una reclamacion, contacte con nuestro DPO en dpo@prtask.com o con la ICO en ico.org.uk.

fil.PrivacyThirdPartyDescription: Nakikipag-integrate ang PrTask sa mga third-party service kabilang ang GitHub para sa authentication at repository integration, mga payment processor tulad ng Maya Business para sa paghawak ng mga transaksyon, Cloudflare para sa hosting at content delivery network (CDN), at mga identity verification provider para sa pagsunod sa Know Your Customer (KYC). Ang bawat third-party service ay gumagana sa ilalim ng sarili nitong privacy policy. Ibinabahagi lamang namin ang pinakamababang datos na kailangan para gumana ang bawat integration. Pinananatili namin ang Data Processing Agreements (DPAs) sa lahat ng third-party processor ayon sa hinihingi ng General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) at ng mga naaangkop na batas sa proteksyon ng datos.
fil.PrivacyUkGdprDescription: Kung ikaw ay nasa United Kingdom, ang iyong personal na datos ay protektado sa ilalim ng UK GDPR at ng Data Protection Act 2018, na ipinapatupad ng Information Commissioner's Office (ICO). Mayroon kang kaparehong mga karapatan gaya ng mga data subject sa European Union na nakalista sa itaas, na inangkop sa batas ng United Kingdom. Pinananatili ng PrTask ang isang lawful basis para sa pagproseso ng datos ng mga residenteng nasa United Kingdom at nagpapatupad ng naaangkop na teknikal at organisasyonal na mga hakbang sa seguridad. Kung walang establisimyento ang PrTask sa United Kingdom, magtatalaga kami ng kinatawan sa United Kingdom kapag kinakailangan. Upang gamitin ang iyong mga karapatan o magsampa ng reklamo, makipag-ugnayan sa aming DPO sa dpo@prtask.com o sa ICO sa ico.org.uk.

fr.PrivacyThirdPartyDescription: PrTask s'integre a des services tiers, notamment GitHub pour l'authentification et l'integration des depots, des processeurs de paiement tels que Maya Business pour le traitement des transactions, Cloudflare pour l'hebergement et le reseau de diffusion de contenu (CDN), ainsi que des fournisseurs de verification d'identite pour la conformite Know Your Customer (KYC). Chaque service tiers fonctionne selon sa propre politique de confidentialite. Nous ne partageons que les donnees minimales necessaires au fonctionnement de chaque integration. Nous maintenons des Data Processing Agreements (DPAs) avec tous les sous-traitants tiers, comme l'exigent le General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) et les lois applicables en matiere de protection des donnees.
fr.PrivacyUkGdprDescription: Si vous vous trouvez au Royaume-Uni, vos donnees personnelles sont protegees par le UK GDPR et la Data Protection Act 2018, appliques par l'Information Commissioner's Office (ICO). Vous disposez des memes droits que les personnes concernees de l'Union europeenne mentionnees ci-dessus, adaptes au droit du Royaume-Uni. PrTask maintient une base legale pour traiter les donnees des residents du Royaume-Uni et met en oeuvre des mesures techniques et organisationnelles appropriees. Si PrTask n'a pas d'etablissement au Royaume-Uni, nous designerons un representant au Royaume-Uni lorsque cela sera requis. Pour exercer vos droits ou deposer une plainte, contactez notre DPO a dpo@prtask.com ou l'ICO a ico.org.uk.

hi.PrivacyThirdPartyDescription: PrTask third-party services ke sath integrate karta hai, jinme authentication aur repository integration ke liye GitHub, transactions sambhalne ke liye Maya Business jaise payment processors, hosting aur content delivery network (CDN) ke liye Cloudflare, aur Know Your Customer (KYC) compliance ke liye identity verification providers shamil hain. Har third-party service apni khud ki privacy policy ke tahat kaam karti hai. Hum sirf utna hi minimum data share karte hain jitna har integration ke kaam karne ke liye avashyak ho. Hum General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) aur lagu data protection laws ke anusaar sabhi third-party processors ke sath Data Processing Agreements (DPAs) banaye rakhte hain.
hi.PrivacyUkGdprDescription: Yadi aap United Kingdom me hain, to aapka personal data UK GDPR aur Data Protection Act 2018 ke tahat surakshit hai, jise Information Commissioner's Office (ICO) lagu karta hai. Aapko upar listed European Union data subjects ke saman adhikar prapt hain, jo United Kingdom ke kanoon ke anusar anukulit hain. PrTask United Kingdom residents ke data ko process karne ke liye lawful basis banaye rakhta hai aur uchit technical aur organizational security measures lagu karta hai. Yadi PrTask ka United Kingdom me koi establishment nahin hai, to avashyak hone par hum United Kingdom representative niyukt karenge. Apne adhikar prayog karne ya complaint darj karne ke liye hamare DPO se dpo@prtask.com par ya ICO se ico.org.uk par sampark karein.

id.PrivacyThirdPartyDescription: PrTask terintegrasi dengan layanan pihak ketiga, termasuk GitHub untuk autentikasi dan integrasi repositori, pemroses pembayaran seperti Maya Business untuk penanganan transaksi, Cloudflare untuk hosting dan content delivery network (CDN), serta penyedia verifikasi identitas untuk kepatuhan Know Your Customer (KYC). Setiap layanan pihak ketiga beroperasi berdasarkan kebijakan privasinya sendiri. Kami hanya membagikan data minimum yang diperlukan agar setiap integrasi dapat berfungsi. Kami memelihara Data Processing Agreements (DPAs) dengan semua pemroses pihak ketiga sebagaimana diwajibkan oleh General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) dan undang-undang perlindungan data yang berlaku.
id.PrivacyUkGdprDescription: Jika Anda berada di United Kingdom, data pribadi Anda dilindungi berdasarkan UK GDPR dan Data Protection Act 2018, yang ditegakkan oleh Information Commissioner's Office (ICO). Anda memiliki hak yang sama dengan subjek data di European Union yang disebutkan di atas, sebagaimana disesuaikan dengan hukum United Kingdom. PrTask mempertahankan lawful basis untuk memproses data penduduk United Kingdom dan menerapkan langkah keamanan teknis serta organisasional yang sesuai. Jika PrTask tidak memiliki establishment di United Kingdom, kami akan menunjuk perwakilan di United Kingdom jika diwajibkan. Untuk menggunakan hak Anda atau mengajukan pengaduan, hubungi DPO kami di dpo@prtask.com atau ICO di ico.org.uk.

it.PrivacyThirdPartyDescription: PrTask si integra con servizi di terze parti, tra cui GitHub per l'autenticazione e l'integrazione dei repository, processori di pagamento come Maya Business per la gestione delle transazioni, Cloudflare per l'hosting e la content delivery network (CDN), e fornitori di verifica dell'identita per la conformita Know Your Customer (KYC). Ogni servizio di terze parti opera secondo la propria informativa sulla privacy. Condividiamo solo i dati minimi necessari al funzionamento di ciascuna integrazione. Manteniamo Data Processing Agreements (DPAs) con tutti i responsabili del trattamento di terze parti, come richiesto dal General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) e dalle leggi applicabili in materia di protezione dei dati.
it.PrivacyUkGdprDescription: Se ti trovi nel Regno Unito, i tuoi dati personali sono protetti dal UK GDPR e dal Data Protection Act 2018, applicati dall'Information Commissioner's Office (ICO). Hai gli stessi diritti riconosciuti agli interessati dell'Unione europea sopra elencati, adattati al diritto del Regno Unito. PrTask mantiene una base giuridica per trattare i dati dei residenti del Regno Unito e adotta appropriate misure tecniche e organizzative di sicurezza. Se PrTask non ha uno stabilimento nel Regno Unito, nomineremo un rappresentante nel Regno Unito quando richiesto. Per esercitare i tuoi diritti o presentare un reclamo, contatta il nostro DPO all'indirizzo dpo@prtask.com oppure l'ICO su ico.org.uk.

ja.PrivacyThirdPartyDescription: PrTask は、authentication と repository integration のための GitHub、transaction handling のための Maya Business を含む payment processors、hosting と content delivery network (CDN) のための Cloudflare、そして Know Your Customer (KYC) compliance のための identity verification providers などの third-party services と連携しています。各 third-party service は、それぞれ独自の privacy policy に従って運営されます。当社は、各 integration が機能するために必要な最小限の data のみを共有します。当社は、General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) および適用される data protection laws に従い、すべての third-party processors と Data Processing Agreements (DPAs) を維持しています。
ja.PrivacyUkGdprDescription: あなたが United Kingdom に所在する場合、あなたの personal data は UK GDPR および Data Protection Act 2018 により保護され、Information Commissioner's Office (ICO) がこれを執行します。あなたには、上記の European Union data subjects と同様の権利があり、それらは United Kingdom law に適合する形で適用されます。PrTask は United Kingdom residents の data を処理するための lawful basis を維持し、適切な technical and organizational security measures を実施しています。PrTask が United Kingdom に establishment を有しない場合、必要に応じて United Kingdom representative を नियुक्तします。権利を行使するか complaint を提出するには、当社の DPO である dpo@prtask.com または ICO の ico.org.uk までご連絡ください。

ko.PrivacyThirdPartyDescription: PrTask는 authentication 및 repository integration을 위한 GitHub, transaction handling을 위한 Maya Business를 포함한 payment processors, hosting 및 content delivery network (CDN)를 위한 Cloudflare, 그리고 Know Your Customer (KYC) compliance를 위한 identity verification providers 등 third-party services와 통합됩니다. 각 third-party service는 자체 privacy policy에 따라 운영됩니다. 당사는 각 integration이 작동하는 데 필요한 최소한의 data만 공유합니다. 당사는 General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) 및 적용 가능한 data protection laws에 따라 모든 third-party processors와 Data Processing Agreements (DPAs)를 유지합니다.
ko.PrivacyUkGdprDescription: 귀하가 United Kingdom에 있는 경우 귀하의 personal data는 UK GDPR 및 Data Protection Act 2018에 따라 보호되며, Information Commissioner's Office (ICO)가 이를 집행합니다. 귀하는 위에 열거된 European Union data subjects와 동일한 rights를 가지며, 이는 United Kingdom law에 맞게 조정되어 적용됩니다. PrTask는 United Kingdom residents의 data를 처리하기 위한 lawful basis를 유지하고 적절한 technical and organizational security measures를 시행합니다. PrTask가 United Kingdom에 establishment를 두고 있지 않은 경우, 필요할 때 United Kingdom representative를 지정합니다. 귀하의 rights를 행사하거나 complaint를 제출하려면 당사의 DPO인 dpo@prtask.com 또는 ICO의 ico.org.uk로 연락해 주십시오.

nl.PrivacyThirdPartyDescription: PrTask integreert met diensten van derden, waaronder GitHub voor authenticatie en repository-integratie, betalingsverwerkers zoals Maya Business voor transactieverwerking, Cloudflare voor hosting en content delivery network (CDN), en identiteitsverificatieproviders voor naleving van Know Your Customer (KYC). Elke dienst van derden werkt onder haar eigen privacybeleid. Wij delen alleen de minimale gegevens die nodig zijn om elke integratie te laten functioneren. Wij onderhouden Data Processing Agreements (DPAs) met alle externe verwerkers zoals vereist door de General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) en toepasselijke wetgeving inzake gegevensbescherming.
nl.PrivacyUkGdprDescription: Als u zich in het Verenigd Koninkrijk bevindt, worden uw persoonsgegevens beschermd onder de UK GDPR en de Data Protection Act 2018, gehandhaafd door de Information Commissioner's Office (ICO). U beschikt over dezelfde rechten als de hierboven genoemde betrokkenen in de Europese Unie, aangepast aan het recht van het Verenigd Koninkrijk. PrTask handhaaft een rechtsgrond om gegevens van inwoners van het Verenigd Koninkrijk te verwerken en implementeert passende technische en organisatorische beveiligingsmaatregelen. Als PrTask geen vestiging in het Verenigd Koninkrijk heeft, zullen wij waar vereist een vertegenwoordiger in het Verenigd Koninkrijk aanwijzen. Neem contact op met onze DPO via dpo@prtask.com of met de ICO via ico.org.uk om uw rechten uit te oefenen of een klacht in te dienen.

pt.PrivacyThirdPartyDescription: O PrTask integra-se a servicos de terceiros, incluindo GitHub para autenticacao e integracao de repositorios, processadores de pagamento como Maya Business para o tratamento de transacoes, Cloudflare para hospedagem e content delivery network (CDN), e provedores de verificacao de identidade para conformidade com Know Your Customer (KYC). Cada servico de terceiro opera de acordo com sua propria politica de privacidade. Compartilhamos apenas os dados minimos necessarios para que cada integracao funcione. Mantemos Data Processing Agreements (DPAs) com todos os processadores terceiros, conforme exigido pelo General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) e pelas leis de protecao de dados aplicaveis.
pt.PrivacyUkGdprDescription: Se voce estiver no United Kingdom, seus dados pessoais estarao protegidos pelo UK GDPR e pelo Data Protection Act 2018, aplicados pelo Information Commissioner's Office (ICO). Voce possui os mesmos direitos dos titulares de dados da European Union listados acima, adaptados ao direito do United Kingdom. O PrTask mantem uma base legal para processar dados de residentes do United Kingdom e implementa medidas tecnicas e organizacionais de seguranca apropriadas. Se o PrTask nao tiver establishment no United Kingdom, nomearemos um representante no United Kingdom quando exigido. Para exercer seus direitos ou apresentar uma reclamacao, entre em contato com nosso DPO em dpo@prtask.com ou com o ICO em ico.org.uk.

ru.PrivacyThirdPartyDescription: PrTask интегрируется со сторонними сервисами, включая GitHub для authentication и repository integration, платежные процессоры, включая Maya Business, для обработки транзакций, Cloudflare для hosting и content delivery network (CDN), а также providers проверки личности для соблюдения Know Your Customer (KYC). Каждый сторонний сервис работает в соответствии со своей собственной privacy policy. Мы передаем только минимальный объем data, необходимый для работы каждой integration. Мы поддерживаем Data Processing Agreements (DPAs) со всеми third-party processors, как того требуют General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) и применимые законы о защите данных.
ru.PrivacyUkGdprDescription: Если вы находитесь в United Kingdom, ваши personal data защищены в соответствии с UK GDPR и Data Protection Act 2018, исполнение которых обеспечивает Information Commissioner's Office (ICO). У вас есть те же rights, что и у упомянутых выше data subjects в European Union, адаптированные к праву United Kingdom. PrTask поддерживает lawful basis для обработки data жителей United Kingdom и применяет соответствующие technical and organizational security measures. Если у PrTask нет establishment в United Kingdom, мы назначим representative в United Kingdom, когда это потребуется. Чтобы реализовать свои rights или подать complaint, свяжитесь с нашим DPO по адресу dpo@prtask.com или с ICO по адресу ico.org.uk.

tr.PrivacyThirdPartyDescription: PrTask, authentication ve repository integration icin GitHub, transaction handling icin Maya Business dahil payment processors, hosting ve content delivery network (CDN) icin Cloudflare ve Know Your Customer (KYC) compliance icin identity verification providers dahil olmak uzere third-party services ile entegre olur. Her third-party service kendi privacy policy kurallari altinda faaliyet gosterir. Her integrationin calismasi icin gerekli olan asgari data miktarini paylasiriz. General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) ve uygulanabilir data protection laws tarafindan gerektirildigi sekilde tum third-party processors ile Data Processing Agreements (DPAs) surdururuz.
tr.PrivacyUkGdprDescription: United Kingdom'da bulunuyorsaniz, personal data bilgileriniz UK GDPR ve Data Protection Act 2018 kapsaminda korunur ve bunlar Information Commissioner's Office (ICO) tarafindan uygulanir. United Kingdom hukukuna uyarlanmis olarak, yukarida listelenen European Union data subjects ile ayni rights haklarina sahipsiniz. PrTask, United Kingdom residents verilerini islemek icin gerekli lawful basis temeline sahiptir ve uygun technical and organizational security measures uygular. PrTask'in United Kingdom'da bir establishmenti yoksa, gerektiginde bir United Kingdom representative atariz. Rights haklarinizi kullanmak veya complaint sikayetinde bulunmak icin DPO'muz olan dpo@prtask.com ile ya da ICO'nun ico.org.uk adresiyle iletisime gecin.
